// 進行度2,3,3　嵐の真夜中

...I must be hearing things, right...? Hearing a girl's voice from Dario's house...
There's no way he would...
Besides, the girls in this village... ...ah, impossible, haha...

This is the Village Chief's house. It's a mansion so large it's excessive for an old
man living alone. When we were children, my siblings and I, and Mana too, were
allowed to live here.

I wonder if the Village Chief would help Elly... That person who raised us like
family...

...But Dario and Elly are dating. Letting the Village Chief interfere with those
two... But this isn't the time to be saying that... What should I do...

...The village chief betrayed us. To think he was looking at us like that... ...We
need to leave the village as soon as possible.
↑North Forest There is a monster ruin deep in the forest, do not enter

This is the only bathhouse in the village. Village residents can enter for free, so
you can always clean your body!

...But no matter when I come, it's never very crowded. Does everyone not really want
to take baths? ...Especially Dario, or Dario...

...This is the only bathhouse in the village, but honestly, I don't really want to
get close. I can hear Elly's moans coming from the mixed bathing side, and it's
unbearable...

This is the only inn in the village. Since there are hardly any guests, it also
serves as a tavern most of the time. My little sister Elly works here as a waitress.

Elly's service seems to be popular with the old men who drink here, and she's
apparently thriving as the poster girl... but since my sister hates it when I come in
as a customer, I've never actually seen her in action.

Dario only shows off in front of the drinking old men, messing with Elly and handling

Because of that, even the old men have come to look down on Elly... and even when
Dario isn't around, they subject her to harsh sexual harassment. I really don't want
Elly to work here anymore...

The shopkeeper seems to only see Elly as a tool for attracting customers now. No
matter how much the old men sexually harass her, he doesn't pay it any mind at all...

The residents of this village are all weird people... I want to get out of this place
as soon as possible........
Since Dario's back too, he'll probably get this field back in order. That's a relief!

...He's completely ignoring the fields, obsessed with devouring Elly's body... The
day this place is filled with crops like it used to be might never come......

...Now, no one in the village shows any interest in the fields anymore. Everyone just
competes to impregnate Elly... It seems no one plants seeds in the soil
anymore........
This road ahead leads to the Royal City, but I can't go back now...

I can't leave this village right now... I'm worried about Elly. That girl's
boyfriend... I need to see if Dario can really make my sister happy.

I can't leave this place... not until I free Elly from this wretched village... I
have to make the Village Chief acknowledge it soon...

I heard from the village chief, \n[1]? I hear you've been helping us old folks out.
Trying to be useful to the village like that is mighty admirable.

All the facilities around here are short-handed. Healthy young folks like you are in
high demand. Now, don't waste time on an old geezer like me, go on and help out.

Watching \n[1] run around the village reminds me of when you were children... You've
been the heart of this village, brightening it up since back then...

Just seeing young folks full of energy gives an old man like me strength too. They
say children are treasures, and it's true...
Oh, \n[1], I heard! Your sister has become one of us, hasn't she? My, that's wonderful!

With this, it seems like this village will finally get its vitality back! With that
girl's big hips, she could easily give birth to ten children! Hoho! The village will
be secure!

Your sister, I wish she'd hurry up and have a child... Before I kick the bucket, I
want to see children running around here again...

That's right, where did Mana go? If you knock her up too, you'll have children twice
as fast! Come on, \n[1]? Go fetch that girl right now!

Young folks are so full of energy... If I were younger, I'd have grabbed that big ass
and fucked her all night long...

\n[1]-kun, I heard? That childhood friend of yours, that guy named Dario, came back...
Are you okay? Did anything happen?
Ah, ah! No, that's fine then...! It's nothing, don't worry about it!

Hey, how long are you planning to take off? Shouldn't you get back to adventuring
soon? You know, things have been dangerous lately...or maybe not...

......Could it be that something happened between you and Dario? ...S-so it's
true...... You finally found out too, huh...

Ah, no... They used to sneak around and meet up in places like that sometimes... I
just happened to stumble upon them once......

Well, anyway, it's like this... When you're young, you make all kinds of mistakes!
Your little sister will come to her senses someday, yeah...!

I'm sure your little sister will realize her own mistakes someday, right? So, you
should follow your own path. Return to the Royal City quickly and use that power for
everyone's sake.

...It seems I've seen that face before. I've been treated coldly as an outsider for a
long time too, so I think I understand your feelings a little.

That's just the kind of people they are. They only see outsiders as tools... ...If
you can, you should flee to the Royal City as soon as possible.

I know you're not the kind of person who would abandon your sister... but please,
don't lose sight of your own path.

With your power, you could save dozens... no, hundreds of lives. You're too good for
a village like this. So please, go back to Mana-chan...

...Hah, another day with nothing happening... Lately, monsters hardly even show up,
it's too peaceful... Maybe I don't even need to come to a village like this

...What is it, \n[1]-kun? Don't worry about me, this is my job! Haha! Just having

...\n[1]-kun, you can slip out of this village right now without anyone noticing.
You're too good a person to stay in a place like this... Please, leave this village.

...I heard, \n[1]. Seems like you've been running around the village lately, doing our

Well, well, looks like you finally remembered the favor you owe us for being picked

\n[1], what are you doing out so late? Hurry up and go home. Your sister must be

Tch...still hanging around? Hurry up and go home, \n[1]! Well, I get not wanting to
